briefdescription.para: Max supported types, used for creating lookup table for parameters for types supported number should be max valid + 1 (as first slot will be for invalid parameterXSecure_LmsOtsType XSecure_LmsOtsType.
32-bit value with all bits set
common lengths - they remain same irrespective of place they are used
Length of I field.
Length of q field.
For now supported variants o/p length match.
32 byte random value for every msg to be authenticated
Size of XSECURE_D_MESG.
Size of XSECURE_D_PBLC.
Digest and Checksum related.
Length of checksum field after digest.
Digest of data to be authenticated concatenated with checksum value.
Prefix fields length, before sending actual data to sha engine for digest.
OTS public key sizes.
'n' bytes
OTS Public key total size.
'i' Field, this causes different hash output for hash position in signature
'j' Field, this causes different hash output for per iteration (inner loop)
Size of individual hash chain placed in sequence in signature
Total size of buffer, XSecure_LmsOtsHashPerDigit.
Used for calculating the size of z array, based on p value.
Max possible size as supported only till XSECURE_LMS_OTS_W2.
Total MAX Size of buffer used in OTS verification.
Total Size of buffer used in OTS verification, while considering current 'p' parameter.
Offset of 'I' field in OTS Public key.
Offset of 'q' field in OTS Public key.
Offset of 'Type' field in OTS Signature buffer.
Offset of 'C' field in OTS Signature buffer.
Offset of 'Y' field in OTS Signature buffer.
Offset of 'I' field in temporary buffer, where inner loops result are stored, for reprocessing during OTS operations.
Offset of 'q' field in temporary buffer, where inner loops result are stored, for reprocessing during OTS operations.
Offset of 'i' field in temporary buffer, where inner loops result are stored, for reprocessing during OTS operations.
Offset of 'j' field in temporary buffer, where inner loops result are stored, for reprocessing during OTS operations.
Offset of 'Y' field in temporary buffer, where inner loops result are stored, for reprocessing during OTS operations.
Offset of 'I' field in temporary buffer, where inner loops result is concatenated during OTS operations.
Offset of 'q' field in temporary buffer, where inner loops result is concatenated during OTS operations.
Offset of D_PBLC field in temporary buffer, where inner loops result is concatenated during OTS operations.
Offset of 'z' field in temporary buffer, where inner loops result is concatenated during OTS operations.
Reserved.
Not Supported.
Types of LMS_OTS supported.

simplesect.para: Only 32 byte output is supported, i.e., 256 bit SHA or SHAKE are only supported, w=1 is not supported

briefdescription.para: Not Supported.
Number of bits per digit Possible values are as supported by ROM, w=1 is not supported.
Not Supported.
'u' corresponding to 'w' = 2
'u' corresponding to 'w' = 4
'u' corresponding to 'w' = 8
Number of 'w' width digits possible in message Digest, excluding checksum Possible values are as supported by ROM.
Not Supported.
'v' corresponding to 'w' = 2
'v' corresponding to 'w' = 4
'v' corresponding to 'w' = 8
Is the number of 'w' width digits possible in checksum Possible values are as supported by ROM.
'ls' corresponding to 'w' = 2
'ls' corresponding to 'w' = 4
'ls' corresponding to 'w' = 8
Not Supported.
No.of bits to left-shift in Checksum, in the 16 bit value Possible values are as supported by ROM.
Not Supported.
'p' corresponding to 'w' = 2
'p' corresponding to 'w' = 4
'p' corresponding to 'w' = 8
Is a sum of U + V, it is number of 'w' width digits possible in digest + checksum buffer Possible values are as supported by ROM.
LMS OTS Public key structure.
Temporary buffer, used in LMS OTS signature verification, used in hash chain to arrive at values which will be concatenated and hashed to get public value.

Structure used when validating LMS OTS, once hash chain is completed, result needs to be stored so that they can be further concatenated and hashed to get OTS public key, this provides a way to access members and fill data in a structured way.
Partial LMS OTS Signature structure.

detaileddescription.para: struct Size = 4 + 32 Sign size = 4 + 32 + (p * n) = 4 + n * (p+1)

briefdescription.para: Temporary buffer, used to send prefix fields to calculate digest for data to be authenticate.

detaileddescription.para: Size = I (16) + q (4) + D_MESG (2) + C (32) = 54 Bytes

briefdescription.para: Digest for message to be authenticated, along with checksum.

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 const *const Arr, const u32 ArrayIndex, const u32 w)
memberdef.name: XSecure_LmsOtsCoeff

briefdescription.para: This function extracts the digits from the array for bytes.

detaileddescription.para: If i is larger than the number of w-bit values in S, then coef(S, i, w) is undefined, this can't be checked here

parameterdescription.para: Byte array from where the digit needs to be picked
When array is divided into array of digits, i represents the index of digit
Width in bits, for each digit allowed values

memberdef.argsstring: (const u8 *const Array, const u32 ArrayLen, const u32 w, const u32 ls, u32 *const Checksum)
memberdef.name: XSecure_LmsOtsComputeChecksum

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the checksum for a given array.

parameterdescription.para: Byte array ffor which checksum needs to be calculated
Width in bits, for each digit allowed values
Number of bits to left-shift the calculated checksum
Pointer to address, where computed checksum needs to be copied

listitem.para: If loop counter is glitched, the signature verification fails

briefdescription.para: This function returns the parameters for the type of LMS OTS type.

parameterdescription.para: XSecure_LmsOtsType, type of OTS algorithm selected
Pointer to array location where all predefined parameter values are present XSecure_LmsOtsParam

listitem.para: XSECURE_LMS_OTS_TYPE_UNSUPPORTED_ERROR - LMS OTS type is not supported
XSECURE_LMS_OTS_TYPE_LOOKUP_GLITCH_ERROR - Glitch detected during type lookup
'w' = 1' variations and 24 bit hash outputs are not supported in this library
default, and other not supported options
Two possible glitches, replacing this condition with a NOP, we will update error and exit flipping condition, we update error and exit, so both cases it is OK.
Update register to be taken care by caller

briefdescription.para: This file contains structures, constants and defines used in LMS OTS and provides interface to LMS OTS operations.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ---------------------------------------------------------- 5.4 kal 07/24/24 Initial release 5.7 tvp 11/20/25 Code refactoring for platform specific LMS functionality
